query:
ALTER TABLE kitchenQuotations 
ADD COLUMN hasPaintedDoors BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN paintedDoorsUpperQty INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN paintedDoorsUpperPrice DECIMAL(12,2),
ADD COLUMN paintedDoorsLowerQty INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN paintedDoorsLowerPrice DECIMAL(12,2),
ADD COLUMN paintedDoorsPantryQty INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN paintedDoorsPantryPrice DECIMAL(12,2),
ADD COLUMN paintedDoorsDrawerQty INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN paintedDoorsDrawerPrice DECIMAL(12,2),
ADD COLUMN paintedDoorsSpiceQty INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN paintedDoorsSpicePrice DECIMAL(12,2),
ADD COLUMN paintedDoorsGolaQty INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN paintedDoorsGolaPrice DECIMAL(12,2),
ADD COLUMN paintedDoorsTotalPrice DECIMAL(12,2);
